title: How The World's Best Investors Are Playing AI
description: If you think AI is just hype, think again. In this video, Sandeep breaks down why this AI wave is different and where the smartest money is going. From billion-dollar infrastructure plays like NVIDIA and ASML to AI's role in disrupting healthcare, defense, and enterprise software, this video shows you exactly how to think about investing in AI today.
